title: SemiFlow: Chernoff Approximation of Operator Semigroups
description: A no_std Rust library for solving linear evolution equations and PDEs by Chernoff approximation of operator semigroups. Implements Theorem 6 of Remizov (2025) with 60+ engine families covering heat, diffusion, Schrödinger, hypoelliptic, manifold, graph, tensor-train, and reverse-AD operators. Only 3 runtime dependencies; flat ~3 MB memory footprint; C, Python, and WebAssembly bindings.
